'''zhovasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nuchal|nuchal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nuchal|nuchal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhovasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhovasithi|zhovasithi]] || [[word:zhovasiji|zhovasiji]] || [[word:zhovasishi|zhovasishi]] || [[word:zhovasiki|zhovasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhovasuthuthu|zhovasuthuthu]] || [[word:zhovasujuju|zhovasujuju]] || [[word:zhovasushushu|zhovasushushu]] || [[word:zhovasukuku|zhovasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhovasuthu|zhovasuthu]] || [[word:zhovasuju|zhovasuju]] || [[word:zhovasushu|zhovasushu]] || [[word:zhovasuku|zhovasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhovasufthuf|zhovasufthuf]] || [[word:zhovasufjuf|zhovasufjuf]] || [[word:zhovasufshuf|zhovasufshuf]] || [[word:zhovasufkuf|zhovasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhovasethe|zhovasethe]] || [[word:zhovaseje|zhovaseje]] || [[word:zhovaseshe|zhovaseshe]] || [[word:zhovaseke|zhovaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhovasothotho|zhovasothotho]] || [[word:zhovasojojo|zhovasojojo]] || [[word:zhovasoshosho|zhovasoshosho]] || [[word:zhovasokoko|zhovasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhovasotho|zhovasotho]] || [[word:zhovasojo|zhovasojo]] || [[word:zhovasosho|zhovasosho]] || [[word:zhovasoko|zhovasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhovasofthof|zhovasofthof]] || [[word:zhovasofjof|zhovasofjof]] || [[word:zhovasofshof|zhovasofshof]] || [[word:zhovasofkof|zhovasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfthĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfjĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfshĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfkĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfthĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfjĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfshĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfkĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfthĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfjĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfshĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovasĂŻfkĂŻf|zhovasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhovasĂŠthĂŠ|zhovasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhovasĂŠjĂŠ|zhovasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhovasĂŠshĂŠ|zhovasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhovasĂŠkĂŠ|zhovasĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhovasathatha|zhovasathatha]] || [[word:zhovasajaja|zhovasajaja]] || [[word:zhovasashasha|zhovasashasha]] || [[word:zhovasakaka|zhovasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhovasatha|zhovasatha]] || [[word:zhovasaja|zhovasaja]] || [[word:zhovasasha|zhovasasha]] || [[word:zhovasaka|zhovasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhovasafthaf|zhovasafthaf]] || [[word:zhovasafjaf|zhovasafjaf]] || [[word:zhovasafshaf|zhovasafshaf]] || [[word:zhovasafkaf|zhovasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhovasasha|zhovasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhovashĂ«sha|zhovashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhovasrosha|zhovasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhovasmusha|zhovasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhovasyasha|zhovasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhovasnkshĂ«sha|gozhovasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhovasnkrosha|gozhovasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhovasnkmusha|gozhovasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhovasnkyasha|gozhovasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhovavasasha|zhovavasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhovavashĂ«sha|zhovavashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhovavasrosha|zhovavasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhovavasmusha|zhovavasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhovavasyasha|zhovavasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhovavasnkshĂ«sha|gozhovavasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhovavasnkrosha|gozhovavasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhovavasnkmusha|gozhovavasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhovavasnkyasha|gozhovavasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhevĂŠsasha|zhevĂŠsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhevĂŠshĂ«sha|zhevĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhevĂŠsrosha|zhevĂŠsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhevĂŠsmusha|zhevĂŠsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhevĂŠsyasha|zhevĂŠsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhevĂŠsnkshĂ«sha|gozhevĂŠsnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhevĂŠsnkrosha|gozhevĂŠsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhevĂŠsnkmusha|gozhevĂŠsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhevĂŠsnkyasha|gozhevĂŠsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhovfasasha|zhovfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhovfashĂ«sha|zhovfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhovfasrosha|zhovfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhovfasmusha|zhovfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhovfasyasha|zhovfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhovfasnkshĂ«sha|gozhovfasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhovfasnkrosha|gozhovfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhovfasnkmusha|gozhovfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhovfasnkyasha|gozhovfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
